name: IRC_WHATSAPP_TEMPLATE_VL
query: SELECT B.WA_TEMPLATE_ID WA_TEMPLATE_ID, B.WABA_TEMPLATE_NAME WABA_TEMPLATE_NAME, TL.WA_TEMPLATE_DISPLAY_NAME WA_TEMPLATE_DISPLAY_NAME, B.TEMPLATE_STATUS TEMPLATE_STATUS, B.DESCRIPTION_TYPE_CODE DESCRIPTION_TYPE_CODE, B.WABA_CATEGORY WABA_CATEGORY, TL.WABA_TEMPLATE_CONTENT WABA_TEMPLATE_CONTENT, TL.LANGUAGE LANGUAGE, B.DESC_VERSION_ID DESC_VERSION_ID, B.PRODUCT_CONTEXT PRODUCT_CONTEXT, B.TEMPLATE_SOURCE TEMPLATE_SOURCE, B.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM IRC_WHATSAPP_TEMPLATE_B B, IRC_WHATSAPP_TEMPLATE_TL TL WHERE B.WA_TEMPLATE_ID = TL.WA_TEMPLATE_ID AND TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
